hooks.command: day=$(date +%-d); case $day in 1|21|31) s=st;; 2|22) s=nd;; 3|23) s=rd;; *) s=th;; esac; echo "Session started: $(date +'%B') ${day}${s}, $(date +'%Y') $(date +'%I:%M %p')"; echo $(date +%s) > /tmp/session_start_time
day=$(date +%-d); case $day in 1|21|31) s=st;; 2|22) s=nd;; 3|23) s=rd;; *) s=th;; esac; echo "Current date/time: $(date +'%B') ${day}${s}, $(date +'%Y') $(date +'%I:%M %p')"

if [ -f /tmp/session_start_time ]; then start=$(cat /tmp/session_start_time); now=$(date +%s); elapsed=$(( now - start )); hours=$(( elapsed / 3600 )); mins=$(( (elapsed % 3600) / 60 )); snoozed=0; if [ -f /home/cade/.alert_snoozed_until ]; then snooze_until=$(cat /home/cade/.alert_snoozed_until); [ $now -lt $snooze_until ] && snoozed=1; fi; if [ $elapsed -ge 14400 ]; then echo "WALK JOSH REMINDER: You have been working for ${hours}h ${mins}m. Time to walk Josh."; if [ $snoozed -eq 0 ]; then DISPLAY=:0 source ~/venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:0 ~/venv/bin/python /media/cade/E/agents/alert/alert.py "WALK JOSH — ${hours}h ${mins}m at the desk" 2>/dev/null & fi; elif [ $elapsed -ge 5400 ]; then last_break=0; [ -f /tmp/last_break_reminder ] && last_break=$(cat /tmp/last_break_reminder); since_remind=$(( now - last_break )); if [ $since_remind -ge 300 ] && [ $snoozed -eq 0 ]; then echo $(date +%s) > /tmp/last_break_reminder; echo "WORKOUT REMINDER: You have been working for ${hours}h ${mins}m. Time for a workout break."; DISPLAY=:0 ~/venv/bin/python /media/cade/E/agents/alert/alert.py "WORKOUT BREAK — ${hours}h ${mins}m at the desk" 2>/dev/null & fi; fi; fi
git -C /media/cade/E add -A && git -C /media/cade/E commit -m 'Session end auto-commit' --allow-empty && git -C /media/cade/E push
